name: Kogtek
description: Kogtek is a specialist data engineering consultancy. We build big data pipelines, BI dashboards, ML models, and computer vision systems on AWS and Azure.

name: Kogtek
description: Kogtek is a data engineering consultancy specializing in big data pipelines, business intelligence, machine learning, computer vision, and cloud-native data infrastructure on AWS and Azure.

itemOffered.name: Big Data Engineering
itemOffered.description: Distributed data pipelines using Apache Spark and Hadoop, deployed on AWS EMR and Azure HDInsight.

itemOffered.name: Business Intelligence & Reporting
itemOffered.description: BI architectures and reporting layers including executive dashboards and operational drill-downs.

itemOffered.name: Machine Learning & AI
itemOffered.description: End-to-end ML model development and deployment for demand forecasting, anomaly detection, recommendation engines, and churn prediction.

itemOffered.name: Mobile & Web Development
itemOffered.description: Data-driven web and mobile applications with real-time analytics dashboards and ML-powered features.

itemOffered.name: Computer Vision & Image Processing
itemOffered.description: Computer vision systems for quality inspection, object detection, and medical image analysis using deep learning.

itemOffered.name: Web Scraping & Data Extraction
itemOffered.description: Scalable web scraping and crawling systems handling anti-bot measures, JavaScript rendering, and high-volume extraction.
